description_for_human: Browse and launch your workplace applications directly from Copilot.
description_for_model: Use this to show the user a directory of workplace applications. Supports filtering by category, keyword search, and showing favorites only.

functions.name: AppsDirectoryTool
functions.description: Show the workplace apps directory. Supports filtering by category, keyword, or showing only favorites.

category.description: Filter apps by category name, e.g. "Human Resources" or "Tools & Collaboration".

searchQuery.description: Search and filter apps by keyword in title or description.

showFavoritesOnly.description: Pass "true" to show only the user's favorite apps.

tools.name: AppsDirectoryTool
tools.description: Show the workplace apps directory. Supports filtering by category, keyword, or showing only favorites.

category.description: Filter apps by category name, e.g. "Human Resources" or "Tools & Collaboration".

searchQuery.description: Search and filter apps by keyword in title or description.

showFavoritesOnly.description: Pass "true" to show only the user's favorite apps.
